category_sources: Official Invisible Island page describes Berkeley Yacc as generating LALR(1) parsers.
source_facts.description identifies byacc as a yacc variant.
display_name_sources: Official Invisible Island documentation expands BYACC as Berkeley Yacc.
docs_sources: Official Invisible Island BYACC page provides synopsis, history, documentation links, and downloads.
repo_sources: Official Invisible Island BYACC page provides source archives and documentation, but no maintainer source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official Invisible Island page describes Berkeley Yacc as an LALR(1) parser generator compatible with yacc.
